name: Documentation
title: GovTribe Documentation
description:
Search and retrieve GovTribe documentation articles and article segments. Start with `query` to discover relevant `article_name`, `article_url`, `collection`, and `part_id` values, then call again with `article_names`, `article_urls`, or `part_ids` to retrieve exact content.

Use `collections` to narrow the search when you know the documentation area. Available collections: `data-model` (Data model), `govtribe-for-agents` (GovTribe for Agents), `govtribe-user-guide` (GovTribe User Guide).

Use `max_tokens` to control returned content length. Results include `truncated`; call again with returned `part_id`s or article selectors to continue retrieval.

query.description: Search query used to discover relevant GovTribe documentation articles, URLs, and part IDs. Omit when retrieving exact article_names, article_urls, or part_ids.

collections.description: Optional documentation collection filters. Search without this field first if you do not know the collection.

article_names.description: Optional exact/free-form article names discovered from prior search results. No enum is exposed; use query first to discover names.

article_urls.description: Optional exact article URLs discovered from prior search results, such as `/docs/data-model/data-types`.

part_ids.description: Optional exact documentation segment IDs returned by prior search results.

limit.description: Maximum number of search results. Defaults to 8, maximum 20.

max_tokens.description: Approximate maximum content tokens to return. Defaults to 3000, maximum 20000.

include_content.description: Whether to include documentation markdown content. Defaults to true; set false to discover article names, URLs, and part IDs only.

name: Search_GovTribe

query.description: A retrieval-ready GovTribe search query. The tool does not rewrite it with another LLM call.

govtribe_types.description: Optional GovTribe type allowlist for narrowing the integrated search to specific datasets.

name: BLS_Occupational_Wage_Data
title: BLS Occupational Wage Data
description: Query GSA CALC+ BLS occupational wage data either as normalized search rows or as aggregation-derived filter options for pricing workflows.

mode.description: Choose search for normalized wage rows or filters for aggregation-derived narrowing options.

keyword.description: Optional keyword query. Pass an explicit empty string to preserve a blank keyword parameter.

page_size.description: Number of rows requested from the CALC+ API.

ordering.description: Optional ordering field passed through to CALC+. Verified supported values on 2026-04-02: area_name, industry_code, occupation_code, occupation_level, occupation_name, rate, state_name.

sort.description: Sort direction. Requires ordering and defaults to asc when ordering is present.

exclude.description: Optional raw exclude string passed through to the CALC+ API.

filters.description: Raw filter expressions in FIELD:VALUE format. These are sent as repeated filter query parameters.

fields_to_return.description: Optional top-level response shaping similar to LLMResource selected fields. Omit to keep the default mode-specific envelope, or provide a list of top-level fields to retain. In search mode, raw aggregations are available but not returned by default.

item_fields_to_return.description: Search-mode only. Optional per-row field selection similar to LLMResource selected fields. Omit to keep full CALC+ rows, or provide the exact search item fields you want returned under items.

naics_category_ids.description: Optional GovTribe NAICS category ids. The tool resolves them to canonical NAICS codes and merges them into industry_code before querying CALC+.

occupation_name.description: Single exact BLS occupation title to use as the keyword search anchor. This is not sent as filter=occupation_name because the live CALC+ endpoint rejects that filter shape.

occupation_code.description: Single exact SOC or occupation code to use as the keyword search anchor. This is not sent as filter=occupation_code because the live CALC+ endpoint rejects that filter shape.

occupation_level.description: Occupation level filter values such as Junior, Journeyman, Senior, or SME.

area_name.description: Human-facing area labels. Supply paired normalized_area_name values alongside these.

normalized_area_name.description: Canonical area keys. Supply paired area_name values alongside these.

summary.description: Summary statistics derived from CALC+ aggregations. median_price is the median of returned rate values; wage_stats is the raw CALC+ stats aggregation.

items.description: Search-mode rows. Each item flattens _source and preserves _id and sort when present. Key row fields include rate, h_mean, h_median, national_h_mean, national_h_median, area_name, state_name, occupation_name, occupation_code, occupation_level, and areatype_code.

aggregations.description: Raw CALC+ aggregations returned alongside search results.

empty.description: True when search mode returned zero rows.

occupation_names.description: Filters-mode occupation title options from live CALC+ aggregations.

occupation_codes.description: Filters-mode occupation code options from live CALC+ aggregations.

occupation_levels.description: Filters-mode occupation-level options from live CALC+ aggregations.

states.description: Filters-mode state options from live CALC+ aggregations.

industries.description: Filters-mode industry code and NAICS title buckets.

areas.description: Filters-mode paired area options. Use area_name and normalized_area_name together when narrowing to a single geography.

modeling_presets.description: Guide-derived modeling defaults such as occupation-level percentile mappings and escalation options.
